title: Light the Path
objectiveText: Build a series circuit with a 9V source that produces exactly 30 mA of current. You'll need to figure out the right resistance!

reward.title: Circuit Apprentice
reward.description: You completed your first challenge! Ohm's Law is your friend.

title: Split the Voltage
objectiveText: Create a circuit where the total resistance is at least 500Ω and the total power consumption stays below 0.5W. Use a 12V source.

reward.title: Power Manager
reward.description: You've learned to balance voltage, resistance, and power!

title: Current Limiter
objectiveText: Design a circuit with a 24V source where the current is less than 10 mA. Think about what resistance you need!

reward.title: Safety Engineer
reward.description: You understand how to limit current — a critical safety skill in electronics!
